display_text: Bloodseeker Aghanim's Scepter: Rupture gains increased initial damage and 2 charges. This upgrade counters mobility and escape mechanics, allowing Bloodseeker to punish multiple fleeing enemies or reapply Rupture after dispels or BKB usage.
search_text: Bloodseeker Aghanim Scepter Rupture charges anti-mobility escape punish dispel BKB reapply

display_text: Bloodseeker Aghanim's Shard: Bloodrage attacks deal 2% of target's max health as Pure damage. This upgrade counters high-health and armor-reliant heroes, transforming Bloodseeker into a tank-buster who can shred durable frontliners.
search_text: Bloodseeker Aghanim Shard Bloodrage pure damage anti-tank high-health armor shred
